---
title: "The school ranking"
subtitle: "It's at the school level that gaps are widest. But it's also where it's easiest to be misled."
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
source("R/common.R")
source("R/i18n.R")
source("R/figures.R")
lang <- "en"
g <- etab_data()
```

::: {.callout-note}
This page is being translated; the narrative text is not final.
:::

## The raw ranking

*Text to be translated.*

```{r top-etab}
#| echo: false
tbl_etab_top(g, lang)
```

## The funnel plot

*Text to be translated.*

```{r funnel}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 5
#| fig-alt: "Funnel plot of schools."
fig_etab_funnel(g, lang)
```

## Schools genuinely above average

*Text to be translated.*

```{r solides}
#| echo: false
tbl_etab_solides(g, lang)
```
